query:
SELECT rs.id as "id?", rs.room_id as "room_id!", rs.room_type as "room_type?", rs.name as "name?",
                      rs.topic as "topic?", rs.avatar_url as "avatar_url?", rs.canonical_alias as "canonical_alias?",
                      rs.join_rules as "join_rule!", rs.history_visibility as "history_visibility!",
                      rs.guest_access as "guest_access!", rs.is_direct as "is_direct!", rs.is_space as "is_space!",
                      rs.is_encrypted as "is_encrypted!", rs.member_count as "member_count!",
                      rs.joined_member_count as "joined_member_count!", rs.invited_member_count as "invited_member_count!",
                      rs.hero_users as "hero_users!", rs.last_event_id as "last_event_id?",
                      rs.last_event_ts as "last_event_ts?", rs.last_message_ts as "last_message_ts?",
                      rs.unread_notifications as "unread_notifications!", rs.unread_highlight as "unread_highlight!",
                      rs.updated_ts as "updated_ts?", rs.created_ts as "created_ts?"
               FROM room_summaries rs
               INNER JOIN room_summary_members rsm ON rs.room_id = rsm.room_id
               WHERE rsm.user_id = $1 AND rsm.membership IN ('join', 'invite')
               ORDER BY rs.last_event_ts DESC NULLS LAST
